earl-grey-teabourbon-punch.name: Earl Grey Tea–bourbon Punch

ingredients.item: Loose earl grey tea or 4 bags

instructions: Combine tea and 1 1/4 cups boiling water in a heatproof bowl. Let steep 5 minutes, then strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a measuring glass (you should have 1 cup). Let cool.
Meanwhile, bring honey, thyme, 2 rosemary sprigs, and 1/2 cup water to a gentle simmer over medium heat, stirring to combine. Let cool; discard herbs.
Combine tea, honey syrup, lemon juice, bourbon, Cognac, and bitters in a large pitcher or punch bowl. Add 2 cups ice and stir until ice is melted and punch is very cold.
Serve punch in tumblers filled with ice, garnished with rosemary sprigs and lemon wheels.
Syrup and tea can be made 3 days ahead; cover separately and chill. Punch can be made 1 day ahead; cover and chill.

easter-chicken-teleculinaria.name: Easter Chicken
instructions: Place the chicken on a tray and season with white wine, olive oil, chopped garlic, colorau, rosemary and salt. Take it in the oven, preheated to 180oC, and let it bake for about an hour, or until it gets golden. Water once in a while with your own sauce.
Wash the sarcacene wheat, drain it and cook it in the salted water for about 13 to 15 minutes after the water starts boiling. Remove and reserve.
Descasque e pique grosseiramente a cebola e um pouco de salsa. Corte os tomates em quartos. Junte estes ingredientes ao trigo, depois de cozido, e envolva.
Add to the wheat also the roast sauce, mix and put on a serving dish. Have the chicken on top and serve immediately.

eggplant-potato-tomato-stew.name: Eggplant Potato Tomato Stew
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400ºF (200ºC).

With a sharp knife, score a ring around each potato, just deep enough to break the skin. Place the potatoes in a medium pot of cold water. Bring to a boil and cook for about 8 minutes, until about halfway cooked.
Drain the potatoes, and rinse with cold water. Peel off the skin.
Cut the potatoes into ½-inch (1 cm) pieces and set aside.

Divide the eggplant and bell peppers between 2 baking sheets and spread in an even layer. Drizzle with 4 tablespoons of olive oil, and season with salt and pepper to taste. Toss with your hands to coat.
Bake for 25 minutes, flipping halfway through.
Heat the remaining tablespoon of olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Once the oil begins to shimmer, add the onion and cook for 3-4 minutes, until semi-translucent.
Add the tomato paste and stir until well distributed, then add the garlic, paprika, 1 teaspoon salt, and ¾ teaspoon pepper, and cook for another 2-3 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the potatoes, chickpeas, and tomatoes, and stir to incorporate.
Stir in the vegetable broth and cover. Reduce the heat to low and cook for 20 minutes, until the potatoes are tender.
Add the roasted eggplant and bell pepper, and stir to combine. Cook for another 5-10 minutes, until the tomatoes have mostly broken down.
Ladle into bowls, garnish with parsley, and serve. Or, transfer the stew to resealable containers and store in the fridge for up to 5 days or freezer for up to 3 months.
Enjoy!

eggplants-stuffed-with-vegetables-baked-.name: Eggplants Stuffed With Vegetables, Baked Or In The Air Fryer
eggplants-stuffed-with-vegetables-baked-.original_name: Berenjenas rellenas de verduras, al horno o en freidora de aire

ingredients.item: 3 cucharadas de aceite de oliva virgen extra
Hierbas frescas al gusto (perejil o albahaca)

instructions: He starts by washing well the 2 medium eggplants, cut them half and half and cut his pulp with a knife without passing through his skin.
Put them on an oven plate, add an olive oil chorrit above and a pint of salt and bake them at 190 ° C for 25-30 minutes, till the pulp's tender.
While eggplants are made, lava and cut into small pits 1 Red and 1 Yellow Pimento.
Hair and fine pica 1 small onion and 1 garlic tooth.
Wash both mature tomatoes and pics also in small pits.

When eggplants are ready, get them out of the oven and let them get a little warmer. With a spoon, carefully remove his pulp, leaving a little edge and then put up with his fill. Ask her and save her.
Put an extensive frying pan onto medium heat and add 3 tablespoons of olive oil. Incorporates onion and garlic with a pint of salt and cook for 6-8 minutes, until soft and slightly golden.
Add the peppers and cook 5-6 more minutes, stirring from time to time.

It incorporates minced tomatoes and reserved eggplant pulp. Reapes to taste and cooks everything together for 10-12 minutes, till the pilling is well polished and with no excess of fluid. Turn off the fire and add fresh minced herbs.

Filling the eggplant halves with vegetable mix, put them back into the plate and bake them at 190 ° C for another 10-12 minutes, just to integrate the flavors. Add more fresh minced herbs and hot or warm serve them.

emerald-drop-snow-tea.name: Emerald-drop Snow Tea
instructions: Combine water, red wine, sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, ginger, spearmint leaves, and mint leaf in a saucepan; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low and add apple to mixture. Simmer tea until apple breaks easily with a fork, about 5 minutes. Remove apple using a slotted spoon or strainer and pour tea into a mug.

enjoy-chicken-liver-with-carrots-and-pot.name: Enjoy Chicken Liver With Carrots And Potatoes
enjoy-chicken-liver-with-carrots-and-pot.original_name: Disfruta de hígado de pollo con zanahorias y patatas
instructions: Pela las papas y corta en cubos. Haz lo propio con la zanahoria. Reserva.
Trocea la cebolla y el pimiento. Filetea los dientes de ajo. Reserva por separado.
Warm a pan with olive oil and add garlic teeth and onion. Jumps for 2 minutes and incorporates the pepper.
Season with salt and pepper, mix and leap for another two minutes.
Add clear chicken livers to the saucer.
Add some more salt and pepper. Meg and leap for about 6 minutes.
After that time, add the potatoes and carrot. Swallow the white wine, rectify with salt and pepper. Mix and let cook till all ingredients are soft.
Turn it off and get ready, enjoy!

enjoy-this-chicken-breast-with-quinoa-an.name: Enjoy This Chicken Breast With Quinoa And Steamed Vegetables
enjoy-this-chicken-breast-with-quinoa-an.original_name: Disfruta de esta pechuga de pollo con quinoa y vegetales al vapor
instructions: It purifies the oven at 100ºC with a fan, if available, or 120ºC with heat up and down.
Seca las pechugas con papel de cocina, retira posibles restos de grasa, piel, y salpimentar generosamente.
Fitted with iron or frying pan suitable for an oven with both sides.
Take the frying pan directly into the oven for 30 minutes to cook at this low temperature. Turn them at 20 minutes.
rinse the quinoa well and cook in 250 ml of water with the bay, cut garlic, pitted ginger, saffron and some salt.
When it's boiling, cover, put down the fire and let them cook about 20- 25 minutes.
Check the cooking and remove with a fork and remove the flavour and tiddiness with the fine slice of an orange and an oil chorrit. Reserve hot.
Roast the broccoli and steam or microwave for about 8-10 minutes and leave it slightly crisp or to taste.
If you have vapour you can make the broccoli and carrot together, you can add to a pot the carrot and cook till it's soft or at your best. Reserve.
Remove the chicken from the frying pan and put it back into the fire with an orange juice, let it reduce.
Reparates quinoa into plates, steamed or whole breasts and broccoli, watering meat with an orange sauce and dressing with sesame to taste.

espresso-pound-cake-with-cranberries-and.name: Espresso Pound Cake With Cranberries And Pecans

ingredients.item: Plus 6 tablespoons unbleached all purpose flour
Ground cinnamon or 1/2 teaspoon ground allspice or ground cardamom
Plus 2 teaspoons instant espresso powder or instant coffee
Dried sweetened cranberries or dried unsweetened cherries or blueberries

instructions: Preheat oven to 163°C. Butter 9x5x3-inch metal loaf pan. Dust pan with flour, tapping out excess.

Whisk flour, cornstarch, cinnamon, baking powder, and 1/4 teaspoon salt in medium bowl. Whisk eggs and vanilla in small bowl to blend. Using electric mixer, beat butter, sugar, brown sugar, and 1 tablespoon espresso powder in large bowl until fluffy, 2 to 3 minutes. With mixer running, gradually add egg mixture. Add flour mixture in 2 additions, beating on low speed just to blend after each addition. Beat batter 30 seconds on medium speed. Add 3/4 cup pecans and 3/4 cup cranberries; beat just to incorporate evenly. Transfer batter to pan.
Bake cake until top is golden and toothpick inserted into center comes out clean, about 1 hour 10 minutes. Cool in pan on rack 5 minutes. Invert cake; remove pan. Turn cake top side up; cool on rack.

Mix powdered sugar, milk, and 2 teaspoons espresso powder in medium bowl. Spread glaze over top of cake, allowing some to drip down sides. Sprinkle 1/4 cup nuts and 1/4 cup cranberries over. Let stand until glaze sets, about 20 minutes. DO AHEAD Can be made 5 days ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

ever-beef-and-potatoes-casserole.name: Ever Beef And Potatoes Casserole

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Slice potatoes into medium rounds. Heat vegetable oil in a deep skillet over medium heat. Add potato rounds in batches; fry until starting to turn brown, about 5 minutes per batch. Transfer to a paper towel-lined plate to drain; set aside.

Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Add onion and garlic; cook until onion turns translucent, about 5 minutes. Add ground beef; cook and stir until browned and no longer pink, 5 to 7 minutes more. Drain grease from the skillet.
Combine beef mixture and soup in a large bowl. Add mild Cheddar cheese; stir until combined. Season with salt and black pepper.
Combine panko bread crumbs, ⅓ Irish Cheddar cheese, and melted butter; set aside.

Coat a 2-quart baking dish with cooking spray; spread ½ potatoes in the bottom of the dish. Sprinkle with ⅓ Irish Cheddar cheese; cover with ½ beef mixture. Repeat with remaining ½ potatoes, remaining ⅓ Irish Cheddar cheese, and remaining ½ beef mixture; top with panko mixture.
Bake, uncovered, in the preheated oven until browned and bubbly, about 30 minutes.

ever-bread-pudding.name: Ever Bread Pudding
instructions: Prepare the pudding. Whisk eggs in a large mixing bowl to beat lightly. Whisk in milk, 1 cup white sugar, 1 cup brown sugar, heavy cream, butter, vanilla extract, and salt until evenly combined.

Tear sourdough and brioche breads into bite-sized pieces. Add both breads to the custard mixture and stir with a rubber spatula until well coated. Allow to stand at room temperature and soak for 20 to 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Meanwhile, preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Grease a 9x13-inch baking dish with butter.
After soaking, spoon bread mixture into the prepared baking dish.
Bake in the preheated oven for 55 minutes.
Meanwhile, whisk together the remaining 2 tablespoons white sugar, remaining 2 tablespoons brown sugar, and cinnamon in a small bowl.
Remove the pudding from the oven and sprinkle the cinnamon-sugar mixture evenly over the top. Increase oven temperature to 232°C (230 degrees C).
Return pudding to the oven and bake until firm with a lightly crisped top, about 6 minutes. Cool at least 20 minutes before slicing.
While pudding cools, prepare the sauce. Beat egg in a small mixing bowl. Whisk in the heavy cream.

Combine sugar and butter in a medium saucepan over medium heat. Cook, stirring frequently, until butter melts and sugar dissolves. Remove saucepan from heat. While rapidly whisking the butter and sugar mixture, slowly pour in the beaten egg and cream mixture, whisking until entirely incorporated. Whisk in bourbon and return to medium heat. Cook, whisking constantly, for 1 to 2 minutes. Whisk in salt.
Cut the pudding into squares and serve with warm bourbon sauce.
